generated_oml:
instance Motors : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motors in the MABI MAX 100 serial robot"
]

instance Gearboxes : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearboxes in the MABI MAX 100 serial robot"
]

instance SafetyCells : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Safety cells in the MABI MAX 100 serial robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes"
    base:contains Motors, Gearboxes, SafetyCells
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current for the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentMQTTStream
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring output angle for the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleMQTTStream
]

instance InputCurrentMQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance OutputAngleMQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring for situational awareness"
]

instance SituationalAwarenessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Situational awareness derived from dashboard visualization"
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction models for motion control"
]

instance MotionControlAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustments to robot motion for improved accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live-data linking for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for situational awareness"
    DTDFVocab:provides SituationalAwarenessInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Friction model identification to improve robot motion accuracy through control capabilities in machining operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight, MotionControlAdjustment
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hierarchical abstraction level methodology for MBSE"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object-Oriented Software Engineering Methodology for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Systematic Product Engineering and Specification methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System Model-based Architecture and Design Tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component and connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Analysis & Design Language for component and connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component and connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLIBDs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Interface Block Diagrams for component and connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling using MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLV17StateMachine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling using SysML v1.7 state machines"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation tool for analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance OtherSimulationFrameworks : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Additional simulation frameworks for system behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming language for detailed system behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming language for detailed system behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance RawInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw input current sensor data streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance RawOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw output angle sensor data streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance ProcessedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from raw input current and output angle sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentMQTTStream, OutputAngleMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance ProcessedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from raw sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentMQTTStream, OutputAngleMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBDs, AADL, MontiArc
]

instance LogicalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Logical architecture modeled using SysML IBDs and ADLs such as AADL and MontiArc"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBDs, AADL, MontiArc
]

    base:desc "Behavioral aspects described via SysML v1.7 state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLV17StateMachine
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral aspects described via MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomaton
]

    base:desc "Analytical models implemented using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The system is a digital shadow with a strictly one-way data flow from physical to virtual; there is no virtual-to-physical interaction as the digital shadow functions as a passive entity and does not push data back to the physical system."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system's constellation is structured according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1), comprising four core components: Asset (physical system), DataTrace (captured sensor data), Model (digital representation), and Processing (data interpretation module). DataTraces are aggregated from the Asset and processed by the Processing component using the Model to derive insights, maintaining a strictly one-way communication flow from physical to digital without autonomous feedback mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connection employs MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming and integrates Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for live-data linking. Specific details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols are not provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with SysML for systems engineering modeling, ACME, AADL, and MontiArc as architecture description languages (ADLs) for component & connector perspectives, and methodologies including RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT for managing system complexity across abstraction levels."
]
